Trigger.name: Birthday Capture
Trigger.script:
-- This actively checks for a birthday. if BirthdayTracker.currentLookup then local name = BirthdayTracker.currentLookup
-- This captures our day and year as numeric values. local day = tonumber(matches[2]) local month = matches[3] local year = tonumber(matches[4])
-- Stores date into our table for reference. BirthdayTracker.data[name] = { day = day, month = month, year = year }
-- Give visual feedback on capture. Commented out but left for debugging. --cecho(string.format("\n<green>[BIRTHDAY]: Captured %s's birthday: %s %d, %d.<reset>", name, month, day, year))
-- Save the data to so we don't lose it on restart. BirthdayTracker:save()
-- Reset the lookup variable so we don't accidentally capture text from other sources BirthdayTracker.currentLookup = nil end

Trigger.name: Birthday Date Capture
Trigger.script:
-- Forces an udpate of the tracker. BirthdayTracker.currentDate.day = tonumber(matches[2]) BirthdayTracker.currentDate.month = matches[3] BirthdayTracker.currentDate.year = tonumber(matches[4])
BirthdayTracker:save()
cecho("\n<green>Date recorded.<reset>")
BirthdayTracker:checkUpcoming(true)

Trigger.name: Birthday Midnight Update
Trigger.script:
-- Captures the new date from midnight rollover message. local day = tonumber(matches[2]) local month = matches[3] local year = tonumber(matches[4])
-- Updates our internal tracker. BirthdayTracker.currentDate.day = day BirthdayTracker.currentDate.month = month BirthdayTracker.currentDate.year = year
-- Runs the birthday check! We pass 'false' so it is silent unless a birthday is coming up soon. BirthdayTracker:checkUpcoming(false)
-- Save the new date. BirthdayTracker:save()

Trigger.name: Birthday Hidden Capture
Trigger.script:
if BirthdayTracker.currentLookup then local name = BirthdayTracker.currentLookup cecho(string.format("\n<yellow>%s's age is hidden. If you want to track it, add it manually.<reset>", name)) cecho("\n<white>If you know it, type: <yellow>bday add %s <day> <month><reset>", name)
-- Reset lookup so we don't accidentally capture something else BirthdayTracker.currentLookup = nil end

regexCodeList.string: ^(?:His|Her|Faes) date of birth is hidden by the sand of Aeon\.

Alias.name: Birthday Honours
Alias.script:
-- Captures the name entered and format it. BirthdayTracker.currentLookup = matches[2]:title()
-- Sends the command to the game so we still see the honours. -- matches[1] contains the whole command you typed (e.g., "honours Solina") send(matches[1])

Alias.name: Birthday Internal Date
Alias.script:
--This checks the internal date we have saved as the current one. It's mostly for debugging, but I'm leaving it in anyway. local d = BirthdayTracker.currentDate cecho(string.format("
<green>[BIRTHDAY]: Tracker Internal Date: <white>%s %d, %d<reset>
", d.month, d.day, d.year)) cecho("<grey>(If this is incorrect, type 'DATE' to force a game update)<reset>
")

Alias.name: Birthday Debug
Alias.script:
cecho("
<red>--- BIRTHDAY TRACKER DEBUG ---<reset>
")
-- 1. Display the date currently stored in memory local d = BirthdayTracker.currentDate if d.year == 0 then cecho("Internal Date: <yellow>Not initialized yet.<reset>
") else cecho(string.format("Internal Date: <green>%s %d, %d<reset>
", d.month, d.day, d.year)) end
-- 3. Instructions cecho("
<grey>This tracker updates when midnight occurs or you enter the <white>DATE<grey> command.<reset>
") cecho("<grey>Type <white>DATE<grey> manually to force an immediate update.<reset>
") cecho("<red>------------------------------<reset>
")

Script.name: BirthdayTracker
Script.script:
BirthdayTracker = BirthdayTracker or {} BirthdayTracker.data = BirthdayTracker.data or {} BirthdayTracker.monitored = BirthdayTracker.monitored or {} BirthdayTracker.currentDate = BirthdayTracker.currentDate or { day = 1, month = "Sarapin", year = 0 }
BirthdayTracker.monthMap = { ["Sarapin"] = 1, ["Daedalan"] = 2, ["Aeguary"] = 3, ["Miraman"] = 4, ["Scarlatan"] = 5, ["Ero"] = 6, ["Valnuary"] = 7, ["Lupar"] = 8, ["Phaestian"] = 9, ["Chronos"] = 10, ["Glacian"] = 11, ["Mayan"] = 12 }
-- Converts Date to Absolute Day function BirthdayTracker:toAbsDay(day, monthName) local monthNum = self.monthMap[monthName] or 1 return ((monthNum - 1) * 25) + day end
-- Add a player to the watchlist function BirthdayTracker:monitor(name) name = name:title() if not table.contains(self.monitored, name) then table.insert(self.monitored, name) self:save() cecho(string.format("
<green>[BIRTHDAY]: Added %s to the watchlist.<reset>", name)) else cecho(string.format("
<yellow>[BIRTHDAY]: %s is already on the watchlist.<reset>", name)) end end
-- Remove a player from the watchlist function BirthdayTracker:unmonitor(name) name = name:title() if table.contains(self.monitored, name) then for i, v in ipairs(self.monitored) do if v == name then table.remove(self.monitored, i) break end end self:save() cecho(string.format("
<red>[BIRTHDAY]: Removed %s from the watchlist.<reset>", name)) else cecho(string.format("
<yellow>[BIRTHDAY]: %s was not on the watchlist.<reset>", name)) end end
-- Manually inject a birthday (for Sand of Aeon users) function BirthdayTracker:manualAdd(name, day, month) name = name:title() month = month:title()
if not self.monthMap[month] then cecho("
<red>Invalid month: " .. month .. ". Use full Achaean names.<reset>") return end
-- Year 0 indicates age is unknown/hidden self.data[name] = { day = tonumber(day), month = month, year = 0 }
-- Automatically add to watchlist if not already there if not table.contains(self.monitored, name) then table.insert(self.monitored, name) end self:save() cecho(string.format("
<green>[BIRTHDAY]: Manually set %s's birthday to %s %d.<reset>", name, month, day)) end
-- Core Logic function BirthdayTracker:checkUpcoming(verbose) if not self.currentDate.year or self.currentDate.year == 0 then cecho("<red>I don't know the current date yet. Type 'date'.<reset>
") return end
local currentAbs = self:toAbsDay(self.currentDate.day, self.currentDate.month)
if verbose then cecho("
") cecho("
<gold>--- Birthday Watchlist ---<reset>
") cecho(string.format("<grey>Date: %s %d, %d<reset>
", self.currentDate.month, self.currentDate.day, self.currentDate.year)) end
local isMonitored = {} for _, n in pairs(self.monitored) do isMonitored[n] = true end
-- Display Watchlist local sortableWatchlist = {}
for _, name in pairs(self.monitored) do local bday = self.data[name] if bday then local bdayAbs = self:toAbsDay(bday.day, bday.month) local daysLeft = 0
if bdayAbs >= currentAbs then daysLeft = bdayAbs - currentAbs else daysLeft = (300 - currentAbs) + bdayAbs end
-- NEW: Real Time Calculation (1 Game Day = 1 Real Hour) local realTimeStr = "" if daysLeft < 24 then realTimeStr = string.format("<grey>(%d hrs)<reset>", daysLeft) else local realDays = daysLeft / 24 realTimeStr = string.format("<grey>(%.1f days)<reset>", realDays) end
-- Add to our temporary sorting table table.insert(sortableWatchlist, { name = name, days = daysLeft, month = bday.month, day = bday.day, realTime = realTimeStr -- Storing real time instead of age }) elseif verbose then cecho(string.format("<grey>%-12s: [No data - try 'honours %s']<reset>
", name, name)) end end
if verbose then cecho("<gold>--------------------------<reset>
") end
table.sort(sortableWatchlist, function(a, b) return a.days < b.days end)
for _, person in ipairs(sortableWatchlist) do if verbose or person.days <= 25 then local color = "<white>" if person.days <= 10 then color = "<red>" elseif person.days <= 25 then color = "<yellow>" end
-- Updated print format cecho(string.format("%s%-12s: %3d days (%s %d) %s<reset>
", color, person.name, person.days, person.month, person.day, person.realTime)) end end
-- Calculate "Others" local limit = 168 local otherCount = 0 for name, bday in pairs(self.data) do if not isMonitored[name] then local bdayAbs = self:toAbsDay(bday.day, bday.month) local daysLeft = 0 if bdayAbs >= currentAbs then daysLeft = bdayAbs - currentAbs else daysLeft = (300 - currentAbs) + bdayAbs end
if daysLeft <= limit then otherCount = otherCount + 1 end end end
if verbose and otherCount > 0 then cecho("
<grey>There are " .. otherCount .. " other known birthdays in the next 7 real days.<reset>
") cechoLink("<green>[Click here to view them]<reset>
", [[BirthdayTracker:showOthers()]], "View other birthdays", true) cecho("
") end end
function BirthdayTracker:showOthers() local currentAbs = self:toAbsDay(self.currentDate.day, self.currentDate.month) local limit = 168 local sortedList = {} local isMonitored = {} for _, n in pairs(self.monitored) do isMonitored[n] = true end
for name, bday in pairs(self.data) do if not isMonitored[name] then local bdayAbs = self:toAbsDay(bday.day, bday.month) local daysLeft = 0 if bdayAbs >= currentAbs then daysLeft = bdayAbs - currentAbs else daysLeft = (300 - currentAbs) + bdayAbs end
if daysLeft <= limit then table.insert(sortedList, {name=name, days=daysLeft, month=bday.month, day=bday.day, year=bday.year}) end end end
table.sort(sortedList, function(a,b) return a.days < b.days end)
cecho("
<gold>--- Other Upcoming Birthdays ---<reset>
") for _, v in ipairs(sortedList) do local color = "<grey>" if v.days <= 25 then color = "<white>" end
-- NEW: Real Time Calculation for "Others" list too local realTimeStr = "" if v.days < 24 then realTimeStr = string.format("<grey>(%d hrs)<reset>", v.days) else local realDays = v.days / 24 realTimeStr = string.format("<grey>(%.1f days)<reset>", realDays) end
cecho(string.format("%s%-12s: %3d days (%s %d) %s<reset>
", color, v.name, v.days, v.month, v.day, realTimeStr)) end cecho("<gold>--------------------------------<reset>
") end
-- Help Function function BirthdayTracker:help() cecho("
<gold>-----------------------------------------------------------<reset>
") cecho("<white> Solina's Birthday Tracker Help (v1.3)<reset>
") cecho("<gold>-----------------------------------------------------------<reset>
") cecho("<green>Data Collection:<reset>
") cecho(" <yellow>honours <name><reset> - Captures a player's birthday automatically.
") cecho(" (Must use this alias, not just 'honours')
") cecho(" <yellow>bday add <name> <day> <month><reset>
") cecho(" - Manually set a birthday (for hidden ages).
") cecho(" (e.g. bday add Solina 7 Valnuary)
")
cecho("
<green>Management:<reset>
") cecho(" <yellow>bday monitor <name><reset> - Add a player to your watchlist.
") cecho(" <yellow>bday unmonitor <name><reset> - Remove a player from your watchlist.
") cecho(" <yellow>bday list<reset> - Show all watched birthdays.
")
cecho("
<green>System & Diagnostics:<reset>
") cecho(" <yellow>bday date<reset> - View the date currently stored in the tracker.
") cecho(" <yellow>date<reset> - (Game Command) Forces Achaea to send the correct date.
") cecho(" <yellow>bday debug<reset> - Show nerd stuff (for troubleshooting).
") cecho("<gold>-----------------------------------------------------------<reset>
") end
-- GMCP Handler function BirthdayTracker:onStatusChange() if not gmcp or not gmcp.Char or not gmcp.Char.Status then return end if gmcp.Char.Status.day then local newDay = tonumber(gmcp.Char.Status.day) if newDay ~= self.currentDate.day then self.currentDate.day = newDay self.currentDate.month = gmcp.Char.Status.month self.currentDate.year = tonumber(gmcp.Char.Status.year) end end end if BirthdayTracker.eventHandlerID then killAnonymousEventHandler(BirthdayTracker.eventHandlerID) end BirthdayTracker.eventHandlerID = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Status", "BirthdayTracker:onStatusChange")
-- Save/Load function BirthdayTracker:save() local path = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/birthday_data.lua" table.save(path, {data = self.data, monitored = self.monitored}) end function BirthdayTracker:load() local path = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/birthday_data.lua" if io.exists(path) then local content = {} table.load(path, content) self.data = content.data or {} self.monitored = content.monitored or {} end end
-- Init BirthdayTracker:load() cecho("
<green>[Solina's Birthday Tracker]: v1.3 Loaded.<reset>
")
